title: Starsilk Chronicles Bridge Helm Art Direction

asset_targets.node_scene: 320x180 PNG with a readable landmark silhouette, route glow, and node-specific color accent.
asset_targets.relic_icon: 96x96 transparent-feeling icon composition on dark plate, readable at 32px.
asset_targets.system_icon: 96x96 UI status sprite with simple silhouette and damage-state highlight compatibility.
asset_targets.route_state: 128x48 UI strip showing available, plotted, or blocked state.
asset_targets.ending_splash: 320x180 final-state image with strong value contrast and distinct emotional read.
